failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: mmINhs
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: mmINhs
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
2. Test Case ID: 5o7JBs
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.699465283" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.699465283"
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:04.699465283","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
3. Test Case ID: cJSDbE
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in body - object with invalid 'phone' value: Incorrect type
[201] Created:
`{"id":321,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":null,"createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": null}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
4. Test Case ID: h8jNV6
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/address:
{ "type": "string", "description": "Street address", "example": 123 }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":324,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":null,"phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": null, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: mmINhs
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
2. Test Case ID: 5o7JBs
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.699465283" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.699465283"
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:04.699465283","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
3. Test Case ID: cJSDbE
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in body - object with invalid 'phone' value: Incorrect type
[201] Created:
`{"id":321,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":null,"createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": null}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
4. Test Case ID: h8jNV6
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/address:
{ "type": "string", "description": "Street address", "example": 123 }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":324,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":null,"phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": null, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
5. Test Case ID: AEsjPm
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:13.941216301","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": ""}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: UIEBA7
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:45:22" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizzeria/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:45:22"
[200] OK:
`[{"id":2,"name":"Roma Antica","address":"Avenida da Liberdade 22, Lisboa","phone":"+351 210 200 200","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22"},{"id":3,"name":"Sicilia Slice","address":"Praça do Mercado 5, Coimbra","phone":"+351 239 300 300","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22"},{"id":4,"name":"ZAP","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:46:12"},{"id":5,"name":"http://www.google.com/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:46:13"},{"id":6,"n // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: UIEBA7
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:45:22" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizzeria/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:45:22"
[200] OK:
`[{"id":2,"name":"Roma Antica","address":"Avenida da Liberdade 22, Lisboa","phone":"+351 210 200 200","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22"},{"id":3,"name":"Sicilia Slice","address":"Praça do Mercado 5, Coimbra","phone":"+351 239 300 300","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22"},{"id":4,"name":"ZAP","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:46:12"},{"id":5,"name":"http://www.google.com/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:46:13"},{"id":6,"n // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: 9cwfvO
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizzeria with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Margherita", "ingredients": "Tomato, mozzarella, basil", "pizzeriaId": 1, "price": 12.5, "size": "medium", "isAvailable": true, "photoUrl": "https://example.com/pizzas/margherita.jpg"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas

1. Test Case ID: 9cwfvO
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizzeria with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574","status":404}`
Reproduce with:

- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574" is not a "date-time"

{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574"

`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizzeria with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:03.175465574","status":404}`
Reproduce with:

2. Test Case ID: iwmM3L
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:22.315450464","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "", "pizzeriaId": 321, "price": 0.0, "size": "large"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas
3. Test Case ID: vJdOgW
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":7,"name":"áÎ󽷴\u0000<¶𜾊","ingredients":"","price":0.5,"size":"small","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":null,"pizzeriaId":321}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "\u0092\u00e1\u00ce\udbb7\uddf4\u0000<\u0093\u008a\u0098\u00b6\ud833\udf8a", "pizzeriaId": 321, "price": 0.5, "size": "small", "\u00d1\u00f1\u001a\u00ae\u0015\u00f7\u00f6Zb\u0087": [[[-11816, false, true], [null, false, true], "3#"], [-1.1, ""], {}], "ingredients": ""}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas

1. Test Case ID: lQJxjK
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.443267059" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.443267059"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizza with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:04.443267059","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Margherita", "ingredients": "Tomato, mozzarella, basil", "pizzeriaId": 1, "price": 12.5, "size": "medium", "isAvailable": true, "photoUrl": "https://example.com/pizzas/margherita.jpg"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas/1

`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizza with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:04.443267059","status":404}`
Reproduce with:

2. Test Case ID: n5mcMJ
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:34.457814399","status":400}`

3. Test Case ID: GUGNBm
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:34" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:34"
[200] OK:
`{"id":258,"name":"Ùò򷖁\r\u0006𡣜\n\u000B\u0012","ingredients":null,"price":0.0,"size":"medium","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:48:34","pizzeriaId":68}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "\u00d9\u00f2\uda9d\udd81\r\u0006\ud846\udcdc\u008e\n\u000b\u0012", "pizzeriaId": 68, "price": 0.0, "size": "medium", "": 0.0}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas/258

- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:03" is not a "date-time"

"2026-04-15T04:48:03"
[200] OK:

1. Test Case ID: 8ZIsDF
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:45:22" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizza/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:45:22"
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: parameter `pizzeriaId` in query - incorrect type
[200] OK:
`[{"id":3,"name":"Pepperoni","ingredients":"Tomato, mozzarella, pepperoni","price":11.00,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513104890138-7c749659a591","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":4,"name":"Quattro Formaggi","ingredients":"Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, provolone","price":12.40,"size":"medium","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":5,"name":"Vegetariana","ingredients":"Tomato, mozza // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas?pizzeriaId='

1. Test Case ID: 8ZIsDF
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:45:22" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizza/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:45:22"
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: parameter `pizzeriaId` in query - incorrect type
[200] OK:
`[{"id":3,"name":"Pepperoni","ingredients":"Tomato, mozzarella, pepperoni","price":11.00,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513104890138-7c749659a591","createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":4,"name":"Quattro Formaggi","ingredients":"Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, provolone","price":12.40,"size":"medium","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-15T04:45:22","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":5,"name":"Vegetariana","ingredients":"Tomato, mozza // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas?pizzeriaId='

1. Test Case ID: LzuMnf
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.493628565" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-15T04:48:04.493628565"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizza with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-15T04:48:04.493628565","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas/1

curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
